{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Deep-Fathom Prison
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Deep-Fathom Prison]] is an [[Underlord]] [[construct]] designed to trap Underlords.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
